chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 1092 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1. For hearing of CMA 5134/2020 2. For hearing of main case 11-04-2023 Mr. Farman Ali Rajput, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ***** This petition is directed against the order dated 17.09.2020, whereby learned Presiding Officer of Anti Encroachment Tribunal, Sukkur dismissed Misc. Application No.39 of 2020 filed by the petitioner by observing that the subject land being owned by Federal Government does not fall within the purview of the Sindh Public Property (Removal of Encroachment), Act, 2010. Learned counsel for the petitioner, at the very outset, fails to make out any case of interference by this Court in the impugned order, as it is an admitted position that the subject land being enemy property is owned by the Federal Government. Hence, this petition being devoid of any merit is dismissed accordingly along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
